app.name: AMO User Info
app.short_description: Shows AMO profile for the ticket requester.
app.long_description: Looks up the ticket requester on addons.mozilla.org and displays their developer profile, add-on count, and ratings.
app.installation_instructions: Enter your AMO API key ID and secret in the app settings. You can generate API credentials at https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/developers/addon/api/key/

amoApiKeyId.label: AMO API Key ID
amoApiKeyId.helpText: The JWT issuer key ID from your AMO API credentials page.

amoApiSecret.label: AMO API Secret
amoApiSecret.helpText: The JWT signing secret from your AMO API credentials page.

amoBaseUrl.label: AMO Base URL
amoBaseUrl.helpText: Override if using a staging instance. Default: https://addons.mozilla.org
